subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-25
subcodes.first_line: The greatest power in the realm and range of human existence is spirit -- the divine breath
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @The Holy Spirit, @the human soul, @spiritual transformation, @realms of being; three realms; five realms
